Next industry: travel (index 6). KEY FINDS (retail): MARKET: AI in retail $18.4B in 2026 -> $130.88B by 2033 (32.4% CAGR). Agentic AI in retail $60.43B (29.29% CAGR). 89% of retailers using/evaluating AI (NVIDIA 2026 survey). 4,700% growth in AI generative traffic to retail sites (mid-2025 YoY). 7x better sales growth for retailers with AI agents (Cyber Week 2025). TOP AGENTS: (1) NVIDIA Retail Shopping Assistant Blueprint (NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints/retail-shopping-assistant, Apache-2.0) — LangGraph multi-agent, 5 specialized agents (Planner/Retriever/Cart/Visual/Safety), Milvus vector DB. Production-ready reference architecture. (2) LightFM (lyst/lightfm, MIT, ~4.8k stars) — hybrid collaborative+content-based rec engine, handles cold-start, battle-tested at Lyst. (3) RecBole (RUCAIBox/RecBole, MIT, ~3.5k stars) — 100+ recommendation algorithms, benchmark datasets, PyTorch. (4) TensorHouse (ikatsov/tensor-house, MIT, ~1.4k stars) — Jupyter notebooks for retail ML: pricing with DQN/RL, demand forecasting, supply chain. (5) NVIDIA Multi-Agent Intelligent Warehouse (Apache-2.0) — warehouse orchestration, real-time rebalancing. (6) Agentic Commerce Protocol/ACP (OpenAI+Stripe, MIT) — open standard for agent-to-commerce transactions. (7) ShoppingGPT (Hoanganhvu123/ShoppingGPT, MIT) — RAG+LLM shopping assistant. (8) Shelf Product Identifier (albertferre/shelf-product-identifier, MIT) — YOLOv8+embeddings shelf monitoring. (9) Stockpyl (LarrySnyder/stockpyl, MIT, ~164 stars) — inventory optimization math. PLATFORMS: Medusa.js (MIT, ~26k stars, AI-first headless), Saleor (Apache-2.0, ~22.4k stars, GraphQL), Bagisto (MIT, ~15k stars, Laravel), WooCommerce (GPL-2.0, ~10.4k), Sylius (MIT, ~8.3k), ERPNext (GPL-3.0, ~22k), Apache OFBiz (Apache-2.0), Odoo (LGPL-3.0, ~39k). KEY TREND: Agentic Commerce — ACP (OpenAI+Stripe) and UCP (Google+Shopify) protocols live, ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity completing real purchases. LATAM: dynamic pricing urgency in Argentina (inflation), ERPNext for Brazilian SMEs with NF-e, WooCommerce augmentation across region. 6 COMPOSE RECIPES: (1) Agentic Shopping Assistant (NVIDIA Blueprint+Medusa+Milvus), (2) Personalized Recommendations (RecBole/LightFM+Saleor), (3) Demand Forecasting+Inventory (TensorHouse+ERPNext), (4) Visual Search (OpenCLIP+Milvus+Saleor), (5) Shelf Monitoring CV (YOLOv8+CLIP+ERPNext), (6) Agentic Commerce Readiness (ACP+UCP+medusa-mcp).
